limits: - Do not fabricate data, facts, or citations
- Do not assume information that was not provided
interaction: - Ask clarifying questions when key details are missing
- Guide the user to provide task-specific context
- Use progressive clarification to understand true intent
check: - Verify STRUCTURE completeness; fill any gaps
- Review output for professionalism, accuracy, and logic
- Ensure alignment with the task goal and user need
- Flag and correct any LIMITS violations
- Add warnings alongside output; do not block delivery
defaultInstructions.search: Auto-search for real-time data when needed

limits: - Imagination, fiction, and analogy are allowed (creation requires it)
- No illegal, hateful, violent, or defamatory content
- Do not use real persons' private info without authorization
check: - Check if the target audience is moved; emotional arc is clear
- Check for vivid detail; avoid clichés and tired tropes
- Check for LIMITS violations (illegal / hateful / privacy)
- Add warnings alongside output; do not block delivery
Creative Expression.search: No web search required; rely on known info and imagination

limits: - No empty statements, no deflection, no exaggeration or concealment
- Avoid vague tone; take a clear stance
- All data and timelines must be verifiable
check: - Verify STRUCTURE completeness; fill any gaps
- Check sincerity of tone; verifiability of data; whether key facts are evaded
- Ensure alignment with the task goal and user need
- Add warnings alongside output; do not block delivery

limits: - Positive framing is OK, but data must be supportable
- No false advertising or promises that cannot be fulfilled
- Do not fabricate awards, endorsements, or partners
- Describe facts objectively; avoid emotional embellishment
- One day or one event per entry; do not conflate
Self Documentation.search: No web search required; rely on facts provided

check: - Verify STRUCTURE completeness; fill any gaps
- Check source traceability; watch for leaps in reasoning
- Review for professionalism, accuracy, and logic
- Ensure alignment with the task goal and user need
- Add warnings alongside output; do not block delivery
Analytical Decision.search: Recommend web-verifying key data, policies, cases, and competitor info

Specialized Report.search: Recommend web-verifying key data, policies, and cases

Plain short text; no Markdown markers

legal.privacyBody:
TL;DR: This is a free, open-source tool. We don't collect your personal info. Your edits stay in your browser.

What we don't collect

  • No sign-up, no email, phone, name, or any personal identifier
  • We never read or upload what you type in the "I/O Input" area
  • No first-party cookies

What we do collect

Only to understand which prompts are popular so we can improve content, all anonymous:

  • Umami Cloud: page views, referrer, device type + custom events (copy, search, AI-platform clicks)

Local storage

Your edits in the I/O area are saved to your browser's localStorage (like a sticky note). Clearing browser data or switching devices loses them. We don't upload, sync, or read them.

Jumps to AI platforms

Clicking ChatGPT / Claude / etc. opens a new tab on that site. Once you leave, their privacy policy takes over.

Contact

Questions or feedback? GitHub Issues or ai3@ai3stack.com.
legal.termsTitle: Terms of Service | AI³ Prompt Dictionary
legal.termsBody:
TL;DR: A free, open-source tool under MIT; verify AI output yourself; don't do harm.

License

Source code is MIT-licensed. Use, modify, and distribute freely.

Content use

Prompts are a helper tool, not a source of truth. Before using AI output:

  • AI may produce inaccurate, outdated, or fabricated information. Verify anything that matters.
  • We make no warranty as to accuracy, fitness, or legality of AI output.
  • Do not use for illegal, infringing, hateful, or discriminatory purposes.

Disclaimer

Site provided "as-is." To the maximum extent permitted by law, we disclaim all direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages.

Feedback

Reach us via GitHub Issues or ai3@ai3stack.com.
